content.text: How can I programmatically tell a smart home system to resume a specific scheduled thermostat program?
What happens if I pass an index that is higher than the number of active thermostats in self.thermostats?
If the provided index is out of bounds for `self.thermostats`, Python will raise an IndexError when trying to access `self.thermostats[index]` within the function.
Got it, thanks for clarifying that potential issue.
